title: Tax Advisor
responsibilities: prepare tax calculations and compliance documents; analyze legislation changes and client impact; advise stakeholders on tax risks and optimization opportunities
requirements_text: We are looking for a junior specialist with hands-on experience in tax compliance, tax planning, excel, accounting, tax legislation. Strong communication and delivery ownership are expected.
benefits: Flexible schedule, paid vacation, learning budget, mentorship, and access to modern tooling.
summary: LaunchPoint is hiring a junior tax advisor to support supporting businesses with tax compliance, planning, and advisory work.
raw_text: Vacancy V096: Tax Advisor at LaunchPoint. Location: Warsaw. Employment: contract. Required experience: 1.9 years. Required skills: tax compliance, tax planning, excel, accounting, tax legislation, vat, corporate tax, transfer pricing. Optional skills: policy drafting, client communication, financial modeling. Responsibilities: prepare tax calculations and compliance documents; analyze legislation changes and client impact; advise stakeholders on tax risks and optimization opportunities.
